resume_analyses.suggestions: [{"category":"Experience formatting","detail":"Expand the resume by adding a dedicated Professional Experience section. Use bullet points starting with strong action verbs to describe how you applied React and Node in past roles, focusing on quantifiable achievements and business impact."},{"category":"Keywords","detail":"Integrate key secondary technologies typically associated with React and Node, such as databases (SQL/NoSQL), state management libraries (Redux), testing frameworks (Jest), and API development practices."},{"category":"Resume Structure","detail":"Include standard resume sections such as an Education section, a brief professional summary, and a Projects section to demonstrate practical application of your skills."}]
